headline: Late-Stage Chronic Kidney Disease Market Analysis Report 2026-2036, Profiles of Key Players - Novartis, Merck & Co, Pfizer, Sanofi, and Johnson & Johnson
summary: The late-stage chronic kidney disease (CKD) market is experiencing significant growth, driven by rising global prevalence of diabetes, hypertension, and aging populations. Advanced treatments like dialysis and kidney transplants are increasingly necessary as late-stage CKD progresses to end-stage renal disease (ESRD). Innovations in dialysis technologies, such as portable and home-based systems, alongside telemedicine integration, are enhancing patient care and treatment adherence. Emerging mark

headline: Amgen Inc. (AMGN): Navellier’s Long-Term Pick on Pipeline Strength and Sales Growth
summary: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is one of Louis Navellier’s top long-term stock picks. On May 14, Piper Sandler reiterated an Overweight rating on Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) but lowered the price target to $427 from $432. The new price target still represents significant upside potential as the research firm expects the company to deliver top-line revenue growth […]
